REVIEW_TITLE: Started leaking after a week
REVIEW_TEXT: Installed this Dolta faucet and within days it started dripping. Very disappointed. Had to call a plumber to remove it. Will not buy Dolta again from TBD.

REVIEW_TITLE: Poor quality control from Dolta
REVIEW_TEXT: The finish was scratched out of the box and the valve cartridge was already worn. Clearly a manufacturing issue from Dolta. Returning to The Build Depot.

REVIEW_TITLE: Returned - defective out of the box
REVIEW_TEXT: DOA. Would not connect properly. Threads were cross-cut. Waste of money. Going with a different brand next time I visit TBD.
